name: 1-cotton Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter with 1/3 cup of sugar.
2. Beat egg whites stiffly and add 1/2 cup of sugar.
3. Put aside.
4. Beat egg yolks with remaining sugar and add to first mixture, heating well.
5. Mix in lightly the egg whites.
6. Flavor with vanilla.
7. Pour into cake pans, well greased, and cook for 25 to 30 minutes at 375 F.
8. Spread marshmallow between layers and cover cake with Foaming Icing.
Per serving: 2596 Calories; 112g Fat (37% calories from fat); 44g Protein; 380g Carbohydrate; 625mg Cholesterol; 2605mg Sodium.
